[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110111011 8
1 0100101000 3
2 1110101111 8
3 0010001110 4
4 0111111110 8
5 1111111101 9
6 1011111111 9
7 1111110011 8

01 10 1111100000 5
12 21 0011110001 5
23 32 0001000100 2
34 43 1011010111 7
45 54 1101111100 7
56 65 1110111101 8
67 76 1000101100 4
70 07 1101101111 8

02 20 1100010001 4
13 31 0010110101 5
24 42 1010010011 5
35 53 0110101011 6
46 64 0011000001 3
57 75 0110010001 4
60 06 0101000011 4
71 17 0010001111 5

03 30 1101010101 6
14 41 1001100010 4
25 52 0111101111 8
36 63 1000010110 4
47 74 1011101101 7
50 05 1011111110 8
61 16 1010100011 5
72 27 0001111110 6

04 40 0110000010 3
15 51 0100011110 5
26 62 1001010010 4
37 73 0000111010 4
